description: Transcribe audio/video from URL or local file using Whisper (local) or OpenAI API

--backend.description: Transcription backend. 'local' uses whisper-cli, 'openai' uses OpenAI API (requires OPENAI_API_KEY)

--language.description: ISO 639-1 language code or 'auto' for auto-detection

--model.description: Override model. Local: tiny, base, small, medium, large, large-v3-turbo. OpenAI: gpt-4o-transcribe, gpt-4o-mini-transcribe, whisper-1

--output.description: Output format. 'auto' uses 'table' for TTY, 'json' when piped

--fields.description: Comma-separated fields to include: text, srt, metadata, files

--dry-run.description: Validate input and show execution plan without transcribing

--no-download.description: Skip yt-dlp download step (input must be local file)

examples: trx transcribe recording.mp4 -b openai -m gpt-4o-mini-transcribe --output json
